description: Macro Overview tab — reframed as a pure indicator backdrop (PR #703, council sign-off 2026-05-17). The regime classifier, vol-trigger tiles, and cycle composite were retired from this page and now live on Asset Tilt. The page is five stacked domain panels — Rates, Credit, Equities, Money & Banking, Economy — each an indicator-tile grid. Click any tile for a modal with KPI strip, history chart, methodology, and source attribution. Fixture updated 2026-05-21 to match this design; the prior fixture described the retired 3-headline composite layout.

exempt_locations.reason: STANCE_MAP defensive remap collapsing legacy labels to v2 lexicon.
indicatorId / elementId props on FreshnessChip — programmatic, not rendered.

_meta.ux_designer_signoff: approved — fixture re-anchored to live 5-domain backdrop
